---
title: "Tennis_Point_Streaks_Part_2"
author: "Muhammed Altindal"
date: "2026-04-09"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
rm(list = ls())
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
```

```{r}
points_clean <- readRDS("points_clean.rds")
#points_clean

colnames(points_clean)

points_clean %>%
  filter(match_id == "2011-frenchopen-1403") %>%
  head(10)

points_clean %>%
  filter(match_id == "2011-frenchopen-1403") %>%
  select(P1_name, P2_name) %>%
  distinct()

points_clean %>%
  filter(match_id == "2011-frenchopen-1403") %>%
  select(P1Score, P2Score) %>%
  head(10)

points_clean %>%
  filter(match_id == "2011-frenchopen-1403") %>%
  select(SetNo, GameNo, P1GamesWon, P2GamesWon) %>%
  head(10)
```

```{r}
selected_match_id <- "2011-frenchopen-1403"

match_seq <- points_clean %>%
  filter(match_id == selected_match_id) %>%
  arrange(SetNo, GameNo, PointNumber) %>%
  mutate(
    point_index = row_number(),
    murray_win = ifelse(PointWinnerName == "Andy Murray", 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  select(
    point_index, match_id, SetNo, GameNo, PointNumber,
    PointWinnerName, PointServerName, murray_win
  )

match_seq
```

```{r}
points_clean %>%
  filter(match_id == "2011-frenchopen-2149") %>%
  select(
    match_id, SetNo, GameNo, PointNumber,
    P1_name, P2_name,
    PointWinnerName, PointServerName
  ) %>%
  head(20)
```


```{r}
colnames(match_seq)
```

```{r}
match_seq <- match_seq %>%
  mutate(
    winner_y = ifelse(murray_win == 1, 1.00, 0.94),
    
    streak_break = ifelse(
      row_number() == 1,
      FALSE,
      PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName)
    ),
    
    one_point_interruption = ifelse(
      row_number() %in% c(1, n()),
      FALSE,
      lag(PointWinnerName) == lead(PointWinnerName) &
        PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName)
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  mutate(
    point_in_set = row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

match_seq
```

```{r}
game_summary <- match_seq %>%
  group_by(SetNo, GameNo) %>%
  summarise(
    game_start = min(point_in_set),
    game_end   = max(point_in_set),
    server_name = first(PointServerName),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r}
match_seq <- match_seq %>%
  mutate(
    winner_y = ifelse(murray_win == 1, 1.00, 0.94)
  ) %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  mutate(
    point_in_set = row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    run_id = cumsum(
      row_number() == 1 | PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName)
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(run_id) %>%
  mutate(
    run_length = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    prev_run_length = lag(run_length),
    streak_break = ifelse(
      row_number() == 1,
      FALSE,
      PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName) & prev_run_length >= 2
    ),
    one_point_interruption = ifelse(
      row_number() %in% c(1, n()),
      FALSE,
      lag(PointWinnerName) == lead(PointWinnerName) &
        PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName) &
        prev_run_length >= 2
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  arrange(point_in_set, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    next_x = lead(point_in_set),
    next_y = lead(winner_y)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot() +
  geom_rect(
    data = game_summary,
    aes(
      xmin = game_start - 0.5,
      xmax = game_end + 0.5,
      ymin = 0.92,
      ymax = 1.02,
      fill = server_name
    ),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = match_seq %>% filter(!is.na(next_x)),
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      xend = next_x,
      y = winner_y,
      yend = next_y
    ),
    linewidth = 0.8,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = match_seq,
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y
    ),
    size = 2.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(match_seq, streak_break),
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y
    ),
    shape = 4,
    size = 3,
    stroke = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(match_seq, one_point_interruption),
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y
    ),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 1,
    fill = "yellow",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_grid(rows = vars(SetNo), scales = "free_x", space = "free_x") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.94, 1.00),
    labels = c("Viktor Troicki", "Andy Murray"),
    limits = c(0.92, 1.02)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Andy Murray" = "#f4a3a3",
      "Viktor Troicki" = "#a8c5f0"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Andy Murray vs Viktor Troicki -", selected_match_id),
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Server",
    caption = "X = streak break | Yellow point = one-point interruption"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )
```
```{r}
find_relaxed_streaks_prof <- function(x, min_length = 8, allowed_losses = 1) {
  
  n <- length(x)
  
  results <- data.frame(
    streak_start_point = integer(),
    streak_end_point = integer(),
    points_won_in_streak = integer(),
    points_lost_in_streak = integer(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  start_idx <- 1
  
  while (start_idx <= n) {
    
    wins <- 0
    losses <- 0
    
    best_end <- NA
    best_wins <- NA
    best_losses <- NA
    
    for (end_idx in start_idx:n) {
      
      if (x[end_idx] == 1) {
        wins <- wins + 1
      } else {
        losses <- losses + 1
      }
      
      if (losses > allowed_losses) break
      
      if (wins >= min_length) {
        best_end <- end_idx
        best_wins <- wins
        best_losses <- losses
      }
    }
    
    if (is.na(best_end)) {
      start_idx <- start_idx + 1
    } else {
      
      results <- rbind(
        results,
        data.frame(
          streak_start_point = start_idx,
          streak_end_point = best_end,
          points_won_in_streak = best_wins,
          points_lost_in_streak = best_losses
        )
      )
      
      # jump to first loss inside streak
      segment <- x[start_idx:best_end]
      first_loss_pos <- which(segment == 0)[1]
      
      if (is.na(first_loss_pos)) {
        start_idx <- best_end + 1
      } else {
        start_idx <- start_idx + first_loss_pos
      }
    }
  }
  
  results %>%
    mutate(
      streak_length = streak_end_point - streak_start_point + 1
    )
}
```

```{r}
basic_streaks <- find_relaxed_streaks_prof(
  x = match_seq$murray_win,
  min_length = 8,
  allowed_losses = 1
)

basic_streaks
```

```{r}
streak_overlay <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(basic_streaks)), function(i) {
  
  start_pt <- basic_streaks$streak_start_point[i]
  end_pt   <- basic_streaks$streak_end_point[i]
  
  match_seq %>%
    filter(point_index >= start_pt, point_index <= end_pt) %>%
    arrange(point_index) %>%
    mutate(streak_id = i)
})
```

```{r}
match_seq <- match_seq %>%
  mutate(
    winner_y = ifelse(murray_win == 1, 1.00, 0.94)
  ) %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  mutate(
    point_in_set = row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    run_id = cumsum(
      row_number() == 1 | PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName)
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(run_id) %>%
  mutate(
    run_length = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    prev_run_length = lag(run_length),
    streak_break = ifelse(
      row_number() == 1,
      FALSE,
      PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName) & prev_run_length >= 2
    ),
    one_point_interruption = ifelse(
      row_number() %in% c(1, n()),
      FALSE,
      lag(PointWinnerName) == lead(PointWinnerName) &
        PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName) &
        prev_run_length >= 2
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  arrange(point_in_set, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    next_x = lead(point_in_set),
    next_y = lead(winner_y)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

game_summary <- match_seq %>%
  group_by(SetNo, GameNo) %>%
  summarise(
    game_start = min(point_in_set),
    game_end   = max(point_in_set),
    server_name = first(PointServerName),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

basic_streaks <- find_relaxed_streaks_prof(
  x = match_seq$murray_win,
  min_length = 8,
  allowed_losses = 1
)

streak_overlay <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(basic_streaks)), function(i) {
  start_pt <- basic_streaks$streak_start_point[i]
  end_pt   <- basic_streaks$streak_end_point[i]

  match_seq %>%
    filter(point_index >= start_pt, point_index <= end_pt) %>%
    arrange(point_index) %>%
    mutate(streak_id = i)
})

set_labels <- data.frame(
  SetNo = c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5),
  label = c("Set 1: 6-3", "Set 2: 6-0", "Set 3: 6-3", "Set 4: 6-2", "Set 5: 7-5")
)

set_label_positions <- match_seq %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  summarise(
    x = mean(range(point_in_set)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(set_labels, by = "SetNo") %>%
  mutate(y = 1.015)

ggplot() +
  geom_rect(
    data = game_summary,
    aes(
      xmin = game_start - 0.5,
      xmax = game_end + 0.5,
      ymin = 0.92,
      ymax = 1.02,
      fill = server_name
    ),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_path(
    data = streak_overlay,
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y,
      group = interaction(SetNo, streak_id)
    ),
    linewidth = 3.5,
    color = "grey35",
    alpha = 0.25,
    lineend = "round"
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = match_seq %>% filter(!is.na(next_x)),
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      xend = next_x,
      y = winner_y,
      yend = next_y
    ),
    linewidth = 0.8,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = match_seq,
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y
    ),
    size = 2.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(match_seq, streak_break),
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y
    ),
    shape = 4,
    size = 3,
    stroke = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(match_seq, one_point_interruption),
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y
    ),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 1,
    fill = "yellow",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = set_label_positions,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      label = label
    ),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(SetNo),
    scales = "free_x",
    space = "free_x",
    labeller = labeller(SetNo = function(x) paste("Set", x))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.94, 1.00),
    labels = c("Viktor Troicki", "Andy Murray"),
    limits = c(0.92, 1.03)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Andy Murray" = "#f4a3a3",
      "Viktor Troicki" = "#a8c5f0"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Andy Murray vs Viktor Troicki -", selected_match_id),
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Server",
    caption = "Grey overlay = identified streak | X = streak break | Yellow point = one-point interruption"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )
```
```{r}
# --------------------------------------------------
# 1) Select the match
# --------------------------------------------------
selected_match_id <- "2011-frenchopen-1403"

match_points <- points_clean %>%
  filter(match_id == selected_match_id) %>%
  arrange(SetNo, GameNo, PointNumber)

player_names <- unique(c(match_points$P1_name, match_points$P2_name))
player_names <- player_names[!is.na(player_names)]

murray_name <- player_names[grepl("Murray", player_names)][1]
opponent_name <- player_names[player_names != murray_name][1]

# --------------------------------------------------
# 2) Build point-by-point match data
# --------------------------------------------------
match_seq <- match_points %>%
  mutate(
    point_index = row_number(),
    murray_win = ifelse(PointWinnerName == murray_name, 1, 0),
    winner_y = ifelse(murray_win == 1, 1.00, 0.94)
  ) %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  mutate(
    point_in_set = row_number()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    run_id = cumsum(row_number() == 1 | PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName))
  ) %>%
  group_by(run_id) %>%
  mutate(
    run_length = n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    prev_run_length = lag(run_length),
    streak_break = ifelse(
      row_number() == 1,
      FALSE,
      PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName) & prev_run_length >= 2
    ),
    one_point_interruption = ifelse(
      row_number() %in% c(1, n()),
      FALSE,
      lag(PointWinnerName) == lead(PointWinnerName) &
        PointWinnerName != lag(PointWinnerName) &
        prev_run_length >= 2
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  arrange(point_in_set, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(
    next_x = lead(point_in_set),
    next_y = lead(winner_y)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# --------------------------------------------------
# 3) Relaxed streak function
#    Allows one-point interruption inside a long streak
# --------------------------------------------------
find_relaxed_streaks_prof <- function(x, min_length = 8, allowed_losses = 1) {
  
  n <- length(x)
  
  results <- data.frame(
    streak_start_point = integer(),
    streak_end_point = integer(),
    points_won_in_streak = integer(),
    points_lost_in_streak = integer()
  )
  
  start_idx <- 1
  
  while (start_idx <= n) {
    wins <- 0
    losses <- 0
    
    best_end <- NA
    best_wins <- NA
    best_losses <- NA
    
    for (end_idx in start_idx:n) {
      if (x[end_idx] == 1) {
        wins <- wins + 1
      } else {
        losses <- losses + 1
      }
      
      if (losses > allowed_losses) break
      
      if (wins >= min_length) {
        best_end <- end_idx
        best_wins <- wins
        best_losses <- losses
      }
    }
    
    if (is.na(best_end)) {
      start_idx <- start_idx + 1
    } else {
      results <- rbind(
        results,
        data.frame(
          streak_start_point = start_idx,
          streak_end_point = best_end,
          points_won_in_streak = best_wins,
          points_lost_in_streak = best_losses
        )
      )
      
      segment <- x[start_idx:best_end]
      first_loss_pos <- which(segment == 0)[1]
      
      if (is.na(first_loss_pos)) {
        start_idx <- best_end + 1
      } else {
        start_idx <- start_idx + first_loss_pos
      }
    }
  }
  
  results %>%
    mutate(
      streak_length = streak_end_point - streak_start_point + 1
    )
}

# Find relaxed streaks
basic_streaks <- find_relaxed_streaks_prof(
  x = match_seq$murray_win,
  min_length = 8,
  allowed_losses = 1
)

# --------------------------------------------------
# 4) Build streak overlay data for plotting
# --------------------------------------------------
streak_overlay <- purrr::map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(basic_streaks)), function(i) {
  start_pt <- basic_streaks$streak_start_point[i]
  end_pt   <- basic_streaks$streak_end_point[i]
  
  match_seq %>%
    filter(point_index >= start_pt, point_index <= end_pt) %>%
    arrange(point_index) %>%
    mutate(streak_id = i)
})

# --------------------------------------------------
# 5) Game summary for serve shading
# --------------------------------------------------
game_summary <- match_seq %>%
  group_by(SetNo, GameNo) %>%
  summarise(
    game_start = min(point_in_set),
    game_end   = max(point_in_set),
    server_name = first(PointServerName),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --------------------------------------------------
# 6) Set labels and set scores
# --------------------------------------------------
set_scores <- match_points %>%
  group_by(SetNo, GameNo) %>%
  summarise(
    p1_games = max(P1GamesWon, na.rm = TRUE),
    p2_games = max(P2GamesWon, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  summarise(
    p1_games = max(p1_games, na.rm = TRUE),
    p2_games = max(p2_games, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    set_score = paste0(p1_games, "-", p2_games)
  )

set_label_positions <- match_seq %>%
  group_by(SetNo) %>%
  summarise(
    x = mean(range(point_in_set)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(set_scores, by = "SetNo") %>%
  mutate(
    y = 1.015,
    label = paste0("Set ", SetNo, ": ", set_score)
  )

# --------------------------------------------------
# 7) Plot
# --------------------------------------------------
ggplot() +
  geom_rect(
    data = game_summary,
    aes(
      xmin = game_start - 0.5,
      xmax = game_end + 0.5,
      ymin = 0.92,
      ymax = 1.02,
      fill = server_name
    ),
    alpha = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_path(
    data = streak_overlay,
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y,
      group = interaction(SetNo, streak_id)
    ),
    linewidth = 4,
    color = "grey35",
    alpha = 0.35,
    lineend = "round"
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = match_seq %>% filter(!is.na(next_x)),
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      xend = next_x,
      y = winner_y,
      yend = next_y
    ),
    linewidth = 0.8,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = match_seq,
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y
    ),
    size = 2.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(match_seq, streak_break),
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y
    ),
    shape = 4,
    size = 3,
    stroke = 1.1,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = subset(match_seq, one_point_interruption),
    aes(
      x = point_in_set,
      y = winner_y
    ),
    shape = 21,
    size = 3.2,
    stroke = 1,
    fill = "yellow",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = set_label_positions,
    aes(
      x = x,
      y = y,
      label = label
    ),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(SetNo),
    scales = "free_x",
    space = "free_x",
    labeller = labeller(SetNo = function(x) paste("Set", x))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = c(0.94, 1.00),
    labels = c(opponent_name, murray_name),
    limits = c(0.92, 1.03)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = setNames(c("#a8c5f0", "#f4a3a3"), c(opponent_name, murray_name))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = paste(murray_name, "vs", opponent_name, "-", selected_match_id),
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    fill = "Server",
    caption = "Grey overlay = identified relaxed streaks | X = streak break | Yellow point = one-point interruption"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )

# Optional: view detected streaks
basic_streaks
```
